name: CANTOS CHIP canakinumab cancer incidence analysis
summary: A CANTOS genomic analysis testing whether clonal hematopoiesis mutation status modified the association between canakinumab assignment and incident non-hematological malignancy.
population: CANTOS participants with targeted genomic sequencing and incident malignancy follow-up

trial_details.horizon_note: Results are already in the public evidence layer, so this is not an open no-result watch item.
trial_details.why_it_matters: Results matter for Transposon and Somatic Mutation Control because they can show whether the intervention changes health or disease-risk outcomes and safety in CANTOS participants with targeted genomic sequencing and incident malignancy follow-up. That is still narrower than proof of broad aging reversal.
